Seishinkai — Past Support Association Chairmen

11985–presentYoshihiko WatanabeChairman & President, Nabex

Seishinkai — Past Support Association Directors

12012–presentMitsuhiro AraPresident, Roger

Headquarters Seishinkan Dojo — Past Deputy Shihan

1 1985–1985 Atsushi Nakajima Headquarters Deputy Shihan
2 1986–1989 Toshihiro Kayano Headquarters Deputy Shihan
3 1994–1996 Kazunori Sumiyoshi Headquarters Deputy Shihan
4 1996–1999 Koichi Sueyoshi Headquarters Deputy Shihan
5 1999–2002 Toshinobu Inura Headquarters Deputy Shihan
6 2002–2003 Kazuya Aoki Headquarters Deputy Shihan
7 2004–2005 Kayoko Mimura Headquarters Deputy Shihan
8 2006–2007 Kazuaki Namikawa Headquarters Deputy Shihan
9 2008–2010 Tadayuki Ishimori Headquarters Deputy Shihan
10 2010–2012 Tsubasa Okubo Headquarters Deputy Shihan
11 2015–2016 Tsubasa Nimori Headquarters Deputy Shihan
12 2018–2021 Takushi Muroki Headquarters Deputy Shihan
13 2022–present Kazuya Shima Headquarters Deputy Shihan
14 2026–present Fuyuki Shima Headquarters Deputy Shihan
15 2026–present Saori Okimura Headquarters Deputy Shihan
16 2026–present Takao Kimura Headquarters Deputy Shihan

Headquarters Seishinkan Dojo — Past Shihan (Head Instructors)

1 2002–2003 Kazunori Sumiyoshi Headquarters Chief Shihan
2 2006–2012 Kayoko Mimura Headquarters Chief Shihan, Acting Director
3 2012–2015 Tsubasa Okubo Assistant Director, Headquarters Shihan
4 2015–2016 Tsubasa Nimori Acting Director
5 2016–2026 Tsubasa Okubo Headquarters Chief Shihan
6 2026–present Nobutaka Maekawa Headquarters Shihan

Seishinkai Seishinkan Dojo — Past OB Association Chairmen

11999–presentMasami Koyano1st Chairman

Headquarters Seishinkan Okubo Dojo — Past Directors

1 1986–2012 Katsumi Okubo 1st Director & Founder
2 2012–2015 Kayoko Mimura 2nd Director
3 2016–2020 Tsubasa Nimori 3rd Director
4 2020–present Tsubasa Okubo 4th Director

Seishinkai

NPO All Japan Seishinkai Karate Federation

  • 2-1-27 Sakaedori, Shiroishi-ku, Sapporo
  • TEL 011-300-0048（Mon–Fri 13:00–16:00）
  • FAX 011-300-0094
  • Karate@seishinkan.ne.jp
